programme.title: Rookie Blue: Under Fire
programme.desc: After Andy and Chloe take fire from an unseen shooter, the officers realize they are the targets of someone with a grudge against 15 Division

programme.title: Rookie Blue: You Can See the Stars
programme.desc: In the wake of a targeted attack on the officers of 15 Division (ep. 412), Andy, Swarek, and their fellow officers have to piece together the truth about a past crime in order to find Oliver Shaw – in time to save his life

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Blink
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the night’s traumatic events, Andy and Dov try to pull themselves together at an all-night diner, but are caught off-duty and off-guard in a volatile diner hold-up.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: All by Her Selfie
programme.desc: Oliver gets promoted and Andy is tasked with training 15 Division’s newest rookie, Duncan Moore. But when Andy and Duncan respond to a messy homicide at a pawnshop, it’s clear this rookie is going to give Andy the challenge of a lifetime.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Heart Breakers, Money Makers
programme.desc: When Andy and Nick’s seizure at an illegal gambling house leads to a suspicious confession, Andy recruits Sam to help figure out who’s lying, why, and where the money is, before anyone gets hurt.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Wanting
programme.desc: When a tenement-building shooting leads to the discovery of an executed gang leader, 15 Division must race to find the killer before a gang war breaks out

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Going Under
programme.desc: When 15 Division goes undercover at a club-land bar that’s a possible hub for illegal handguns, Chris’s erratic behavior and concern for a specific drug dealer make Dov suspicious.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Two Truths and a Lie
programme.desc: As the officers of 15 Division try to hunt down the killer of Brian Gowdy – Andy and Sam go on the road to interview a list of inmates at Millburn Penitentiary.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Deal with the Devil
programme.desc: In the midst of a chaotic day at the station, Oliver prepares Andy to defend herself at Duncan’s dismissal hearing, now happening two hours from now

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Exit Strategy
programme.desc: Chris’s addiction issues come to a head when an innocuous call to a middle-class home puts Dov and Chris in the middle of a suspicious home invasion investigation

programme.title: Rookie Blue: "Moving Day"
programme.desc: 15 Division is assigned to a community outreach program, “Moving Day”, to help tenants move out of a subsidized-housing complex that’s being torn down

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Fragments
programme.desc: Andy’s former rookie, Duncan, is back on duty and looking to reconcile – something she’s not ready for yet. But personal feelings get thrust aside when a bomb explodes in a downtown parking garage

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Everlasting
programme.desc: The officers of 15 Division work to track down TED MCDONALD (the car-bomber from Ep. 510). But even after catching him, they realize Ted has more targets set to explode out there. The clock is ticking

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Open Windows
programme.desc: Andy is attacked by an intruder at Traci’s place and the Sex Crimes Unit steps in to take over the case their way, 15 Division will have decide whether to take matters into their own hands.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Perfect Family
programme.desc: Andy’s ideas about what makes a perfect family are put into perspective when she meets an out-of-control teen who needs to be protected from her own conservative family.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Uprising
programme.desc: A riot breaks out at a women’s correctional institute while Andy, Juliet, Nick, and Gail are there to transfer prisoners. They end up in a lock-down situation that finds Andy and Juliet trapped with a woman desperate to prove her innocence

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Letting Go
programme.desc: When Nick’s estranged older brother emerges with new information on someone from their tragic past, Nick goes off the grid to track the man down. But Juliet is hot on his heels, and Nick is forced to let her into the secrets of his past.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: A Real Gentleman
programme.desc: When Traci is a no-show for her first raid, 15 Division fears the notorious gun dealer they’re after has kidnapped her. But when Andy realizes that the serial rapist we never caught is back, it’s all hands on deck to find Traci

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Home Run
programme.desc: After a community-outreach baseball game erupts in a drive-by shooting, Gail’s relationship with her brother is put to the test . Meanwhile, Swarek plans a getaway with Andy up to Oliver’s cabin, which goes off the rails in every possible way

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Best Man
programme.desc: Andy and Sam are shocked to learn that Oliver is the prime suspect in IA’s corruption investigation into 15 Division. They only have until end of day today to find Chris Klem – the missing explosives-dealer – and clear Oliver’s name

programme.title: Cyclops
programme.desc: A corrupt emperor (Eric Roberts) forces a soldier (Kevin Stapleton) to fight a single-eyed giant in a gladiatorial arena.

programme.title: Mazes and Monsters
programme.desc: A college student (Tom Hanks) begins to live the role he plays with three friends in a medieval fantasy game.

programme.title: The Legend of Hercules
programme.desc: Betrayed by his stepfather, the King, and exiled and sold into slavery because of a forbidden love, Hercules must use his formidable powers to fight his way back to his rightful kingdom.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: Legendary half-demon Hellboy encounters an ancient resurrected sorceress who's out to avenge a past betrayal. Caught in a clash between the supernatural and the human, Hellboy becomes hell-bent on stopping her without triggering the end of the world.

programme.title: Horns
programme.desc: Blamed for the murder of his girlfriend, a man (Daniel Radcliffe) awakes one morning to find he has grown a pair of horns. Armed, now, with supernatural powers, he sets out to find the killer.

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter
programme.desc: The fate of the human race hangs in the balance when the Witch Queen (Julie Engelbrecht) rises from the dead, seeking revenge against Kaulder (Vin Diesel), the immortal warrior who slayed her centuries ago.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: Legendary half-demon Hellboy encounters an ancient resurrected sorceress who's out to avenge a past betrayal. Caught in a clash between the supernatural and the human, Hellboy becomes hell-bent on stopping her without triggering the end of the world.

programme.title: Hellboy: Sword of Storms
programme.desc: A possessed professor dispatches several creatures to retrieve a powerful sword held by Hellboy (Ron Perlman).

programme.title: Horns
programme.desc: Blamed for the murder of his girlfriend, a man (Daniel Radcliffe) awakes one morning to find he has grown a pair of horns. Armed, now, with supernatural powers, he sets out to find the killer.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Cell Game (REDUX)
programme.desc: When Dante loses Percy to corrupt Oberon police, he must work out a dangerous deal to free Percy, while she fights for her life in prison.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Blacklight (REDUX)
programme.desc: A cryogenic chamber in an abandoned section of the Tulip is accidentally powered up, and the legendary Colonel Bramwell emerges from a 50-year sleep.

programme.title: The Lost World: A Witch's Calling
programme.desc: While Roxton and Malone search for the missing Veronica, two young witches lure them away from safety. Unbeknownst to the explorers, a sorceress and her disciples plot to destroy Challenger.

programme.title: The Lost World: Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: Malone is pierced by a poison dart from a Keeran blowdart. Under the influence of the hallucinogenic poison, Malone relives his nightmarish experience as a battlefield correspondent in WWI.

programme.title: The Lost World: Ice Age
programme.desc: A new Ice Age threatens the ecosystem. The explorers investigate the site of a meteor crash and try to help a woman. Not knowing who she is, they are targeted by her cold-blooded subjects.

programme.title: The Lost World: The End Game
programme.desc: The intractable Death comes to settle her score with Lord Roxton. In a series of games, Roxton plays Death in an attempt to keep his life, as well as the lives of his friends.

programme.title: The Lost World: Phantoms
programme.desc: Veronica is led by the sound of piano music into the arms of a lover from a bygone era. Ignoring Challenger's warnings about her involvement with him, she falls quickly for her new beau.

programme.title: The Lost World: The Secret
programme.desc: An assassin threatens the explorers, and Marguerite fears that he may be linked to her past and come to settle old scores. The secret she tries to bury creates a rift between herself and Roxton.

programme.title: The Lost World: Finn
programme.desc: An experiment with new energy sources goes awry, launching Roxton, Challenger, and Marguerite 100 years into the future. They discover that the rest of the world has been ravaged by war.

programme.title: The Lost World: Suspicion
programme.desc: Finn joins the explorers at the Treehouse. A team of archeologists suffer disease, violence, and distrust after opening an ancient urn that may have housed a demonic spirit.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: An experiment at St. Peter's Hospital threatens the natural order of things when an embittered billionaire (William Hickey) pays a brilliant cardiologist (Bruce Davidson) to help him cheat death. But is death willing to be cheated so easily?

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Aggie (Thora Birch) is an outcast at her elementary school because strange things seem to happen around her. When she is suspended from school, her parents hire a nanny who seems too good to be true. Will they lose their only child to keep her safe?

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: When a college student (Josh Brolin) experimenting with time travel takes a job with a prestigious lab, he doesn't realize that the lab's billionaire owner understands completely the financial and political benefits of seeing into the future.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Ben Kohler's (Sam Robards) life is saved after having an experimental microchip implanted in his brain, but when he starts seeing murders as if through the eyes of the killer, it becomes clear that something is desperately wrong.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: When Father Anton, a priest who has been questioning his faith, stumbles and hits his head, he suddenly begins to see demons all about him. When those demons bestow upon him the power over life and death, he uses it…but nothing comes without a cost.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: When Sharon Rosman's son is abducted his 6-year-old sister is the only witness but is far too traumatized to speak. When psychologist John Holland comes to work with the young girl, she tells him it was the boogeyman…from under the bed.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Dropped out of space by a chunk of dark matter, pilot Paul Stein (John Heard) discovers a derelict ship lost ten years ago with all hands, including his long-lost brother. Only it seems that the crew may not quite be dead…or alive.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Henry Marshall (Frank Whaley) is a greedy man. Recently released from prison, Marshall has learned little from his experiences. But an encounter with alien beings (Rebecca De Mornay and John Savage) may just teach him a thing or two.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: On a remote planet, Major Stokes (Robert Patrick), one of Earth's best warriors, has been captured by aliens and placed in a cell with a woman who is slowly being transformed into one of the aliens. Can he escape before he suffers a similar fate?

programme.title: Land of the Lost
programme.desc: Rick averts a drought and an energy crisis brought about by the mischievous Pakuni, who have stolen all the Pylon crystals.

programme.title: Roswell : The Untold Truth
programme.desc: Major Jesse Marcel investigates strange debris found in 1947, despite being told it's a weather balloon.

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: It's a disturbing pattern that's been going on for the past 40 years--thousands of cows seemingly slaughtered in the same strange, meticulous way on ranches around the world.

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: For years, people have claimed to have had direct, personal contact with an alien.

programme.title: UFOTV Presents: UFOs: The Best Evidence Volume 1 - The Visitors
programme.desc: This volume of UFOs the Best Evidence focuses on The Visitors, traces UFOs throughout history, including sightings by the world’s most famous people, and an astounding collection of UFO photos and videos which seem to defy explanation and science.

programme.title: The Falcon Lake Incident
programme.desc: Aliens visit Earth often; Canada's 1967 Falcon Lake UFO incident stands out. Canada's frequent sightings make it enigmatic.

programme.title: The Hills' Abduction : The Zeta Reticuli Incident
programme.desc: Barney & Betty Hill's abduction and the Zeta reticuli incident explored.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens and the New World Order 2
programme.desc: Recent discoveries reveal that a highly advanced race of extraterrestrial beings came to Earth in our ancient past, but the shocking realization is that they are still here now, among us and may have a sinister agenda beyond our wildest imaginations.

programme.title: Alien Conspiracies - The Hidden Truth
programme.desc: "Alien Conspiracies" delves beyond UFOs to reveal shocking accounts of alien contact, abductions, and the theory that extraterrestrials may have lived among us since the dawn of humanity.

programme.title: The Witnesses :Ancient Alien Encounters
programme.desc: Contactee, sighter, and abductee share similar and different experiences with beings from other dimensions, leaving a lasting mark of their presence.

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: Analysis of video taken of an alleged UFO over Illinois suggests the object could have been as large as 1500 feet across.

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: How would the military respond if UFOs suddenly invaded restricted U.S. airspace? It allegedly happened.

programme.title: The Hidden Hand Alien Contact and the Government Cover Up
programme.desc: The Hidden Hand is a controversial EBE Award winning documentary that explores the possibility of an extraterrestrial presence here on Earth.

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: In the 1970s and 80s, military pilots allegedly not only saw UFOs but engaged them. The team gets special access to ex-pilots in Iran and Peru who followed strange objects.

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: For years, the team has been tracking an elusive prey only seen at night--ships, shaped like triangles, impossibly huge, and videotaped over cities around the world.

programme.title: Deep Sea Aliens
programme.desc: Explore the mysteries of the deep sea: underwater anomalies, alien abductions, USOs, and unexplained cases that defy our understanding.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek travels to the Yorkshire coast to pick up a 1963 Austin J2 Paralanian campervan, described as the Rolls Royce of campervans.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads to Sunderland to pick up a real Italian beauty: a 1972 Lancia Fulvia Zagato. Red and racy, the car has seen better days, but Derek's still impressed.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Up for sale at the Mathewson's auction is a 1275 Mini GT that hails fom just down the road and could be a future British icon.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads to North Yorkshire to pick up a veteran London-to-Brighton car. There's an emotional farewell to a 1980s Bedford HA van, and a Toyota Corona finds a new home.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek gives the once-over to a Royale Formula Ford race car, and Paul is on a marathon trip to Teesside to pick up a 1953 MGYB, a Moggy Van and an '80s Yamaha 250RD motorbike.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek travels to the Lancashire coast to pick up a rare 1972 Citroen SM, and Dave is on HQ duties and admires a Punto that's two decades old but has just 42 miles on the clock.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek is on the road to pick up a funky little Nissan Figaro and a sublime Ferrari 250 GT tribute car, and Paul gets to try out his sparkling new Scania T Cab.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Claustrophobic prison cells that contain a story worthy of international acclaim, and a vast mountainside complex that held the power to change the world.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A secretive underground base that concealed the power to destroy nations, and a sprawling industrial relic clinging to the edge of an unforgiving waterfall.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A marooned ironclad structure off the coast of England that hides a dramatic story of war and resilience, and a facility in America that helped tear apart a nation.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Forgotten relics from the defence of America's homeland, concealed by the banks of the Mississippi, and a concrete behemoth on the French coast that proved invulnerable.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: An American prison for the violent and deranged with links to an infamous cult leader, and a cavernous tunnel network in France offering shelter from unrelenting bombardment.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: An Albanian village home to Allied secret agents, devastated for resisting the Nazi war machine, and a notorious asylum in America that enforced lobotomies on a terrifying scale.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The desert town that faced a disaster of biblical proportions. Plus, vast coastal ruins that reveal a past once wiped from history.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The paramedic crews treat a drug user with a burst abscess, an elderly woman whose face has swollen, and a distraught young woman who may be suffering a miscarriage.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Paramedics attend an accident at a bus station, treat a feisty pensioner who has angina, a young mum with a suspected stroke, and a child hit by a cricket bat.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: In Dudley, paramedics attend a road accident, while in Stoke, the crews work out how to move a woman with a bad fracture, and answer a call from a woman whose carer has fainted.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The paramedic crews are called to an unconscious child in a park, a seriously unwell man with blood in his colostomy bag, and a deaf woman with chest pains.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The crews reassure a frightened elderly patient with a dislocated hip, treat a baby with a dangerously high temperature, attend a woman with a fast heart rate and help an alcoholic.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The blue lights are flashing as the crews attend a woman with dangerously high blood pressure, a 20-year-old with chest pains, and a woman who has smashed her face in a fall.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The Stoke crews cope with a major heart attack and a nasty football injury, while in Dudley, the paramedics help an elderly diabetic man with severe stomach pains.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: Liza Tarbuck and Jamali Maddix join Dara and the team captains to take part in a five-round gaming challenge featuring titles including `Crash Bandicoot', `Far Cry 3' and `Bomb Jack'.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: Ore Oduba and Kerry Howard join Dara to play a series of games as part of a five-round gaming challenge. Along the way, they battle it out on `Tony Hawk's Skateboarding', `Tomb Raider' and `X-Men vs Street Fighter'.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: Josh Widdicombe and Dr Maggie Aderin-Pocock aim to unearth the next Tonton Zola Moukoko as they play Football Manager - and four other titles - on the witty video game show.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: Matt Forde hopes to remain 'Unspun' as he and Jessica Knappett race each other on Need for Speed. Other classic titles on Dara's consoles-and-comedy show include The Sims.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: DJ Dev and comic Susan Calman do battle on five titles, including Minecraft and Batman - Arkham Asylum.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: The gloriously geeky game show in which celebs duel on consoles. Jonathan Ross and Suzi Ruffell play a mix of retro and modern games, including Final Fight and Titanfall 2.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: Anna Richardson and Nish Kumar grab a D-pad and duel on five classic and contemporary titles, including Virtua Fighter and Worms Armageddon.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: December 2000: 19-year-old Rachel Manning was murdered in Milton Keynes. Two men were wrongfully convicted, but new advances in forensics proved that evil always leaves a trace.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Edinburgh, October 1977: Christine Eadie and Helen Scott vanish without a trace. The police never stopped hunting for justice, even changing the law to bring justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: In late 1992, an attack led to an investigation which would last nearly a quarter of a century. Over time, DNA profiling helped to close a case which detectives feared would never be solved.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The murder of Lynette White led to the longest murder trial in British history at the time. Find out how police work and DNA eventually led police to her killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: A popular, healthy, 60-year-old woman suffered a sudden, painful death. Detectives managed to trace the killer, despite their calculated and elaborate web of deceit.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: A man returning from a family visit stops to help what appears to be a stranded group on the Belt Parkway in Brooklyn, NY. Half an hour later, he is found dead.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The story of the tragic murder of Brett Wentworth, how police tracked his killer down and how advanced forensic technology was key to solving the case.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Sharon Whelan and her two daughters were murdered in their home on Christmas eve by a cold and calculating killer. Multi-discipline forensics uncovered his horrific actions and brought him to justice.
programme.sub-title: The Murders of Sharon, Zarah and Nadia Whelan

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: In February 2012, a man got into a pick-up truck at a mall close to his home and was never seen alive again. Nine months later, after a huge search was launched, police discovered his human remains.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The story of the brutal and senseless murder of Sandra Rozzo. Attempting to understand how and why she died, and how determined police work and forensic science eventually crack the case.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Kristen Swanson was murdered in 1980 however the suspect was not found. Eventually following a 30 year investigation into her death revolutionary DNA techniques allowed the police track down her killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Attacking in broad daylight, the `M25 Rapist' became synonymous with fear and triggered one of the biggest manhunts in British history. All the police had to go on was a trace.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Digital forensics, traditional police work and a good old fashioned stake out stop a killer in his tracks, when all he's left is a digital trace.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Just as Baton Rouge starts to feel safe they discover a second serial killer is at work. However, when he leaves a trace at a scene, and the police find it, they get an unexpected breakthrough.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: When a box containing human limbs was discovered in Florida, an investigation started that tested forensic capabilities, with detectives desperate to discover who the victim was.
programme.sub-title: Mystery of the Dispersed Body Parts

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: By September 1973, with three murders in just three months, South Wales Police realised they were looking for Wales' first documented serial killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: After body parts were found in a Dublin city canal, a broad forensic investigation was needed to identify the victim, and lead police to those responsible.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Following the investigation into the death of Nikitta Grender and the extensive forensics that identified her killer.

programme.title: South Park: Red Sleigh Down
programme.desc: Red Sleigh Down: Cartman's 'naughty or nice' accountant informs him that he has been too bad to earn his Christmas gift. All aboard Mr Hankey's Poo-Choo train for a trip to the North Pole! (S6, E17)

programme.title: South Park: A Very Crappy Christmas
programme.desc: A Very Crappy Christmas: When Mr Hankey fails to show up at Christmas time the boys go looking for him in the sewers. Can the gang revive the spirit of Christmas with their own cartoon? (S4, E17)

programme.title: South Park: Tsst!
programme.desc: Tsst: Cartman's mum realizes she can no longer control him, so attempts to get help from various reality TV experts. Only when she recruits the "Dog Whisperer" do results start to happen. (S10, E07)

programme.title: South Park: A Million Little Fibers
programme.desc: A Million Little Fibers: Towlie writes his memoirs and it's not long before he's invited onto The Oprah Winfrey Show. (S10, E05)

programme.title: South Park: Make Love, Not Warcraft
programme.desc: Make Love, Not Warcraft: The boys are all shades of mad when a 'griefer' repeatedly kills them in an online game. Some serious training is in order so they can defeat him and play the game! (S10, E08)

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Garrison's Fancy New Vagina
programme.desc: Mr Garrison's Fancy New Vagina: Mr Garrison has a sex change, Kyle has an unusual operation to make him tall and athletic enough to play basketball and Kyle's dad has "dolphinoplasty"!?! (S9, E01)

programme.title: South Park: Die Hippie, Die
programme.desc: Die Hippie, Die: Cartman runs a 'pest control' service to rid the town of hippies and is soon arrested, but when a plague of hippies invades South Park the town turn to him and his methods. (S9, E02)

programme.title: South Park: Wing
programme.desc: Wing: The boys become talent agents to make an easy buck. They take on a Chinese lady named Wing and are soon confronted by the Chinese mafia, looking for a slice of the action. Fight! (S9, E03)

programme.title: South Park: Best Friends Forever
programme.desc: Best Friends Forever: Kenny is in a coma. Cartman wants life-support turned off so he can get his PSP. But Kenny's spirit is leading the armies of heaven against the demons of hell! (S9, E04)

programme.title: South Park: The Losing Edge
programme.desc: The Losing Edge: The boys are bored of playing baseball, and concoct a plan to lose the big play-off game. Randy trains hard to become the biggest drunken jackass at each match. (S9, E05)

programme.title: South Park: The Death of Eric Cartman
programme.desc: The Death of Eric Cartman: Everyone decides to ignore Cartman! He is convinced he is dead and must find peace by making amends for his past sins. Will Butters' 'psychic ability' help him? (S9, E06)

programme.title: South Park: Erection Day
programme.desc: Erection Day: Jimmy's noticed that one of his body parts has a mind of his own, so he tries to control his raging hormones in time to perform his comedy routine at the School Talent Show. (S9, E07)

programme.title: South Park: Hotter Than Summer: Marjorine
programme.desc: Marjorine: Cartman is convinced that the girls have a device which can see into the future. The boys come up with a plan to take it. Unfortunately for Butters he's a major part of the plan. (S9, E09)

programme.title: South Park: Follow That Egg
programme.desc: Follow That Egg: In a bid to prevent Mr. Slave from marrying Big Gay Al, Mrs. Garrison forces the children to help him in an experiment to prove that gay marriages are unstable. (S9. E10)

programme.title: South Park: Ginger Kids
programme.desc: Ginger Kids: After giving a hate speech against 'the gingers', Cartman awakens the next day with a case of 'Gingervitus' and soon rallies against the persecution of his fellow red heads. (S9, E11)

programme.title: South Park: Free Willzyx
programme.desc: Free Willzyx: The boys are tricked into believing the killer whale at Sea Park is from the moon. How will Timmy's wheelchair, the Russian government and their skateboards help to free him? (S9, E13)

programme.title: South Park: Bloody Mary
programme.desc: Bloody Mary: Randy is arrested for drunk driving and must attend AA, where he is told he is powerless to control himself. Maybe the bleeding Virgin Mary statue can perform a miracle or two? (S9, E14)

programme.title: South Park: The Return of Chef
programme.desc: The Return of Chef: The boys notice that Chef is acting weird after returning from the 'The Super Adventure Club'. Why is he trying to seduce them? Can a trip to a strip joint help? (S10, E01)

programme.title: South Park: Smug Alert!
programme.desc: Smug Alert: Kyle's father buys a new hybrid car but it's not long before his smug levels reach ridiculous levels - must be time to move to San Fran! How will Cartman deal with no Kyle? (S10, E02)

programme.title: A Haunting: Conjuring Evil
programme.desc: Harold and Cindy have found the perfect retreat in suburban Alaska for their family. But after their daughter begins to experiment in witchcraft, she unknowingly attracts the attention of a dark entity. Harold calls in experts to help reclaim the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Mother's Terror
programme.desc: When Jeanette's firefighter husband dies in the line of duty, she moves her daughters to a rustic hamlet in Long Island to start anew. Shortly after moving in, an evil entity lashes out at her daughter, Jeanette refuses to quit without a fight.

programme.title: A Haunting: When The Lights Go Out
programme.desc: After newlyweds Brooke and Dominic Ardolino experience strange paranormal events in their home, they call in investigators who uncover two spirits – one is trying to warn them while the other is dangerous.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Haunted Cabinet
programme.desc: After James Hilton and his girlfriend Sandy bring an antique cabinet into their home, they capture actual video evidence proving it’s haunted. Sandy fears the entity from the cabinet is taking James over and turns to paranormal investigators for aid.

programme.title: A Haunting: Bewitched
programme.desc: All appears to be on track when Sidney moves his pregnant girlfriend into the home he shares with his mother. But their happiness is suddenly shattered when an ex-friend is trying to tear the couple apart through witchcraft and has endangered everyone.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Apartment
programme.desc: The Spencer’s move to a new apartment that is loud with spirits.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghostly Voices
programme.desc: Angelina Balistreri believes her home is haunted by a harmless ghost, while her husband, Emiliano, is skeptical of the paranormal. They call in a priest and medium who makes contact with a troubled ghost and helps him cross over and find peace.

programme.title: A Haunting: House of Nightmares
programme.desc: When Tracey Berrios experiences paranormal activity inside her new home, she suspects spirits tied to the house's history. But after something evil attacks Tracey, she fears for the safety of her family and turns to paranormal investigators for help.

programme.title: A Haunting: A Haunting in Ireland
programme.desc: The Fahey family’s new addition stirs up psychic energy of a crime committed years ago.

programme.title: A Haunting: Dark Forest
programme.desc: Clara and her family move to rural New York but find that peaceful country life is an illusion.

programme.title: A Haunting: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Strange sounds and eerie sensations lead Charles Gonzales to suspect that a spirit haunts his Florida home. Charles asks Desiree to investigate his home. There, Desiree encounters the vicious spirit who seeks to keep Charles in its clutches forever.

programme.title: A Haunting: Trapped In Terror
programme.desc: Soon after moving into an older home in a quaint suburb of Cincinnati, OH, Taylor Jones catches her mother practicing black magic in her daughter Isabelle’s bedroom. Her fears become reality when Taylor notices Isabelle playing with an invisible friend.

programme.title: A Haunting: A Haunting in Florida
programme.desc: Ed, Beth and their toddler soon learn they are not alone at their ranch house.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Awakening
programme.desc: Marcy’s son is deployed with the Army. Overcome with worry, a dormant spirits threatens her.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghosts Of War
programme.desc: When Dennis Pongratz finds his deceased father's Army belongings, he unlocks a treasure trove of WWII memorabilia, including an armband removed from a Nazi soldier killed in battle. Soon the Pongratz home becomes a battleground between good and evil.

programme.title: A Haunting: Where Demons Dwell
programme.desc: Young David suffers from intense nightmares and is physically attacked by an invisible entity.

programme.title: A Haunting: Immortal Love
programme.desc: Shortly after Whitney's family moving into their first home, a restless spirit shatters the serenity of their suburban life. Whitney calls in a paranormal team who uncover the truth behind the spirit's tragic death and his intense obsession with Whitney.

programme.title: A Haunting: Monster in the Apartment
programme.desc: A ghost attacks Morgan Knudsen in order to drive her out and get to her friend Bob.

programme.title: A Haunting: Fear House
programme.desc: Steven LaChance begins to experience strange things inside his house.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Dubbed the `Vampire of Sacremento', Richard Chase murdered six people in the late 70s, engaging in necrophilia with his victims, and then bathing in their blood or eating their internal organs.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: A young couple from Canada were serial killers capable of severe cruelty. They targeted young women, including a relative of one of the perpetrators, in a series of crimes that would horrify the nation.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: In the summer of 1980, Douglas Clark and Carol Bundy trawled Sunset Strip in Los Angeles looking for prey. Acting out their darkest desires, they left a trail of bloodshed in their wake. What motivated this string of sickening murders?

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Known as `the meanest man in America', Donald Henry Gaskins brutally tortured and killed over 100 people. And, even on Death Row, he managed to commit one final murder.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Childhood friends John Duffy and David Mulcahy murder several women in London.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Richard Cottingham murdered at least six people and dismembered his victims' bodies.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: In 1989, Allan Legere went on a brutal crime spree in Canada, committing assault, rape, arson and murder.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Are serial killers born with the tendency to commit their crimes, or is it learnt? Under the microscope is American Jeffrey Dahmer.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Over a six month period, Colin Ireland lured five gay men to their deaths. As the media whipped up a frenzy of fear proclaiming that a `Gay Slayer' was loose on the streets of London, Ireland continued to taunt the detectives trying to catch him.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Exploring the chilling case of killer cousins David Gore and Fred Waterfield.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Manchester murderer, Trevor Hardy, took the lives of three teenage girls in the 1970s.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: The concluding episode in this investigative series profiles Ivan Milat, the murderer of numerous backpackers in Australia in the 1990s. What led him to kill?

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: In 1999, Carole Sund, her 15-year-old daughter Juli and Juli's friend Silvina Pelosso disappeared from Yosemite National Park, California.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: In 1984, Wesley Shermantine and Loren Herzog embarked upon a drug-fuelled killing spree that would span 15 years, dumping their victims in the remote rural Californian countryside and down old pioneer wells where they had spent their childhood.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: In the 1970s, charming New Jersey resident Robert Reldan abducted and brutally murdered two young women, escaping suspicion for a long time.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Between May 2005 and August 2006, Dale and Jeff Hausner, later joined by Samuel Dieteman, turned drive-by shootings into sport, keeping score as they picked off their victims at random and terrorised the residents of Phoenix, Arizona.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Psychologists and experts in the field seek clues as to what prompted the awful crimes carried out by Beverley Allitt.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Gerald and Charlene Gallego join forces to rape and murder several teenagers.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Ex-marine Cleophus Prince Jr raped and murdered six women in 1990.

programme.title: Double Exposure
programme.desc: Private detective Pete Fleming receives a call from an advertising executive.

programme.title: The Baby and the Battleship
programme.desc: While anchored off the Italian shore, two British sailors are forced to smuggle a baby aboard their ship.

programme.title: Genevieve
programme.desc: Two couples, all car enthusiasts, challenge one another to a friendly race on the return from the annual London-to-Brighton veteran car rally. What starts out playfully becomes increasingly serious as they speed to the finish line.

programme.title: Heavens Above!
programme.desc: An innocent but socially progressive vicar is appointed by mistake to a wealthy, moribund parish. His forward-thinking ideas about Christianity soon begin to upset the conservative parishioners.

programme.title: The Secret Place
programme.desc: A beautiful redhead becomes involved with a small-time gang of hoodlums who plan and perform a daring diamond robbery.

programme.title: 21 Days
programme.desc: After Larry Darrent accidentally kills his lover's blackmailing husband, someone else is arrested for the crime. Larry and Wanda have just three weeks together before the trial of the innocent man.

programme.title: Passage Home
programme.desc: A young woman comes to regret her apparent rescue from a difficult situation in South America by a ship's crew.

programme.title: The Comedy Man
programme.desc: Charles Byrd, known as 'Chick', has spent his adult life acting in small repertory companies all over the UK, and he's never had much luck. All too aware that he is no longer young, Chick makes one last stab at finding success in London.

programme.title: A Window in London
programme.desc: On his way to work, a man looks through the window of his train where he sees a young woman's murder.

programme.title: Some Girls Do
programme.desc: Detective Bulldog Drummond investigates attempts to sabotage Britain's supersonic transport.

programme.title: Delayed Action
programme.desc: Two criminals do a deal with a suicidal man, who will confess to their crimes before he dies.

programme.title: The Maury Show: Top Ten Shocking Family Feuds
programme.desc: We’re counting down the top ten most unbelievable moments of family faceoffs! Plus, we’ll let you know what happened to some of these guests after they left our show and returned to their lives.

programme.title: The Maury Show: 4 Women… 4 Babies… Is He the Father?
programme.desc: We have more of the paternity pandemonium that you crave! You’ll see denying dads, mad moms and some of the most shocking results we’ve ever seen! Don’t miss one second of the drama on today’s MAURY!
programme.sub-title: 4 Women… 4 Babies… Is He the Father?

programme.title: The Maury Show: I Pray My Ex Is Not My Baby's Dad!
programme.desc: Toni, Quintin, and his mom return to find out who fathered his son. This time they’ll wonder if Toni cheated! Jenny needs to know whether her husband Matt or his friend fathered her child! Finally, will Vivian end her 30 year search for her son?
programme.sub-title: I Pray My Ex Is Not My Baby's Dad!

programme.title: The Maury Show: DNA Tests Will Prove You Have 10 Kids!
programme.desc: Terrazina’s own brother Tyson thinks that Simon is not the father. Will Tyson prove she cheated and that Simon is not the father of her daughter? Then, William is in a heated debate with two women over the paternity of their children!
programme.sub-title: DNA Tests Will Prove You Have 10 Kids!

programme.title: The Maury Show: I Slept With 4 Men… Who's The Father?
programme.desc: Ebony swears that Andre fathered her special needs daughter, but he denies it! Then, Jodi completely denies that he’s the father of Ashawnda’s baby! What will the DNA test results say?
programme.sub-title: I Slept With 4 Men… Who's The Father?

programme.title: The Maury Show: The Sex Was Too Short To Make A Baby
programme.desc: Michael says that he and Britny didn’t make love for nearly long enough for her to get pregnant. Shekeita and her sister Natasha are here to prove that Kieary is the real father of Shekeita’s baby.
programme.sub-title: The Sex Was Too Short To Make A Baby

programme.title: The Maury Show: I'm 27…Is My Teen Boyfriend Cheating?
programme.desc: Rachelle believes that her man Chris may be cheating with as many as 50 women, including her sister! Then, Carrie was shocked when she found out that her man Chris lied about his military service.

programme.title: The Maury Show: I Don't Want To Meet Your Baby!
programme.desc: Kyle denies that he fathered Citasia’s child. His mom says that he’s lying. Then, Josh fathered five kids. Dana says that he better prepare for number six because she claims he’s the father of her baby!
programme.sub-title: I Don't Want To Meet Your Baby!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Maury says “You ARE the father!” But are those the words the nervous, alleged fathers want to hear? Or will “You are NOT the father” send the moms into shock? Find out the results on today’s MAURY!
programme.sub-title: I'm Only 16…Am I Her Baby's Dad?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Beware! Hidden Dangers Caught on Tape
programme.desc: On this special edition of The Maury Show, Maury brings celebrity guests to the stage to share some of the most intense and shocking real-life footage ever caught on tape.
programme.sub-title: Beware! Hidden Dangers Caught on Tape

programme.title: The Maury Show: You Texted Nude Photos, Cheater!
programme.desc: After months of begging and pleading, Latoya forgave Justice for cheating. But now they’re back to test him for the same thing! Then, James could be too good to be true – is he cheating on Santa? What will the lie detector tests say?

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Twins Ronquan and Rashard were in and out of foster care since they were young children; they confront their parents, Robert and Shenika, who failed to give them the love and support they needed.
programme.sub-title: My Twin Sent Dad To Jail

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Rosie is certain that her boyfriend and her mother are sleeping together; dance sensation Thick & Fabulous show how they handle trolls and haters.
programme.sub-title: Unlock: Prove You're Not Having Sex with My Mom / Thick & Fabulous…Take on Social Media Haters

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Isiah and girlfriend Marilyn argue about her flirtatious ways; Carl says Barbara's behavior is fishy, and the evidence suggests something is happening.
programme.sub-title: I Was Date Raped and Can’t Trust / Unlock The Phone: Who Is Sending Those Messages?

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Naz wants her girlfriend to decide if she wants to be with men or with her; Nicole records a journal of her husband's whereabouts and is on a mission to catch him cheating.
programme.sub-title: Unlock The Phone: We’ve Been Back Together for 17 Days / Unlock My Phone and Kiss My Feet

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Dionna thinks her younger sister is boy crazy and headed down a path to nowhere; Brenda says she has been having a one-sided friendship and wonders if it is worth salvaging.
programme.sub-title: My 16-Year-Old Sister Is Out of Control / My BFF Doesn’t Care about My Trauma

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: Daniyal is suing her landlord for shutting off her electricity, cutting the gas, and evicting her without notice.
programme.sub-title: You Are The Worst Landlord Ever!

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: Arsenio is taking his ex-tenant to court after claiming she left the unit a mess including leaving two buckets of urine.

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: Jill is suing Laura after failing to repay a loan, but Laura says it was a gift.

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: Edgardo is accusing Arron of not paying his share of the rent, and is suing for what he thinks is owed.

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: Joann says she hired the defendant as a handyman, and he did half the work then disappeared.

programme.title: Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker 900 is the new fast, 15-minute version of snooker. It features legends like Jimmy White and showcases top amateurs, juniors, women, and disabled players.

programme.title: Sports Programme
programme.desc: Bringing the best in television.

programme.title: World Seniors Snooker 900
programme.desc: Live Snooker 900, the new fast and exciting version of the game featuring many of the game’s legendary players in weekly competitions.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 7
programme.desc: Near the junction to East Midlands airport, a trailer sheds its load and causes rush hour chaos. Adam dispatches a crack team of his finest recovery ops, but will they be able to resolve the situation?

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 8
programme.desc: A 20-tonne digger has been written off after it fell into the Thames. Rory is dispatched to rescue a Sprinter which is blocking a bus lane, and Jim has to work fast to get a stranded HGV driver to safety.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 9
programme.desc: A seven car motorway pile-up leaves a local council's waste truck in trouble. Fluff does his best to shift one of the heaviest loads his vehicle can lift. Meanwhile, Fluff's girlfriend Marta is called to a stranded truck in a quarry.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 10
programme.desc: A burnt out van abandoned on an isolated towpath presents a serious challenge for Steve and Marta, but the solution comes in the form of a bespoke, bright yellow rescue truck.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 1
