programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies have fun sliding down into Home Hill. They watch some children painting circus pictures before the Lion and Bear appear in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A little boy goes for a ride on his Grandad’s motorbike and sidecar. In Teletubbyland, Po went to see Tinky Winky on her scooter.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Stephanie Slater
programme.desc: Estate agent Stephanie Slater reveals the story of her abduction, rape and incarceration, which occurred in 1992 whilst showing a man around a house.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Manchester
programme.desc: The series returns to take a closer look at the most horrific crimes ever committed on British soil, starting with the May 2017 Manchester Arena bombing.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Peter Sutcliffe
programme.desc: Arguably Britain's most infamous serial killer, Peter Sutcliffe became known as The Yorkshire Ripper when he began murdering women in Yorkshire during the 1970s.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Rose West
programme.desc: With her husband Fred, Rose West brutally murdered ten girls between 1973 and 1979, making her one of the most high profile serial killers in the UK.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Jeremy Bamber
programme.desc: An investigation into Jeremy Bamber's brutal murder of his family in Essex, which occurred in 1985. Sentenced for life, he still maintains he is innocent. Is the right person behind bars?

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Garry Newlove
programme.desc: Garry Newlove’s wife Helen talks about the events on the night of his murder and the days afterwards, as well as her current work as a peer in the House of Lords combatting anti-social behaviour.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: John Sweeney
programme.desc: John Sweeney brutally murdered two of his girlfriends, dismembered their bodies and dumped them in canals. In a macabre twist, he hid clues in his abstract paintings, and five other girlfriends of his are currently still missing.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Murder Of Rhys Jones
programme.desc: The parents of innocent 11-year-old Rhys Jones, shot on his way home from a football club in Liverpool 2007, speak about the harrowing day when they lost their son.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Suzy Lamplugh
programme.desc: A look at the case of estate agent Suzy Lamplugh, who showed a client around a house in Fulham in July 1986 and was never seen again. Dermot Murnaghan hosts.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Steven Wright
programme.desc: A closer look at the crimes of Steve Wright, who was dubbed 'The Suffolk Strangler' after murdering five women who worked as prostitutes in Ipswich in 2006.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Shipman
programme.desc: Doctor Harold Shipman was convicted of killing 15 patients in 2000, but he is thought to have killed up to 215. Discover how he was eventually caught by detectives.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Raoul Moat
programme.desc: The hunt for Raoul Moat was one of the largest in British history, after he wounded his ex-girlfriend, killed her new partner and shot and blinded police constable David Rathband.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Colin Ireland
programme.desc: In the summer of 1993, gay men in London were being terrorised by a brutal killer. Colin Ireland, a loner from Southend, had made a macabre resolution – to become a serial killer.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Jimmy Savile
programme.desc: Jimmy Savile: From national treasure to one of the UK's most notorious sex offenders: this is the story of how the revelation of Jimmy Savile's crimes left the UK reeling.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Lee Rigby
programme.desc: In broad daylight on a busy Woolwich street on 22nd May 2013, serving soldier Fusilier Lee Rigby was attacked and murdered by Islamic extremists Michael Adebolajo and Michael Adebowale.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Philpotts
programme.desc: When six children died in a house fire in Allenton, Derby in May 2012 it shocked the nation. Parents Mick and Mairead Philpott were charged with the murders. We uncover the reasons behind the arson attack on their own home.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Peter Tobin
programme.desc: Peter Tobin is one of the most notorious serial killers in the UK. From 1991–2006 he raped and murdered three young girls; Dinah McNicol, Vicky Hamilton and Angelika Kluk. Yet even prior to these horrific murders he had a history of violence.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Gemma McCluskie
programme.desc: The harrowing story of EastEnders actress Gemma McCluskie, who was murdered by her older brother in the flat they shared in east London in 2012.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Rochdale Groomers
programme.desc: Rochdale Groomers: Documentary examining the sex abuse scandal which occurred in the North of England and appeared to go undetected for quite some time.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Snap Back
programme.desc: At a gathering to celebrate William and Monica's pregnancy, Maya makes a joke that the baby is hers. Worried that Maya is having trouble dealing with the loss of their baby, Darnell confronts Maya and learns that she has been taking pills to help her cope

programme.title: Girlfriends: Save the Last Dance
programme.desc: Lynn calls Joan, Maya, and William old after realizing they never go out anymore. They decide to prove Lynn wrong by joining her for a night on the town at a hot new club.

programme.title: Girlfriends: R-E-S-P-E-C-T, Find Out What It Means to William
programme.desc: When William begins to feel that he is not respected at work he considers leaving the firm, and Monica freaks out thinking that he won’t be able to support her and their new baby.
programme.sub-title: R-E-S-P-E-C-T, Find Out What It Means to William

programme.title: Girlfriends: Deck the Halls With Bags and Folly
programme.desc: Joan joins a support group for people who have relatives serving in Iraq but is upset when she finds out they are not planning a holiday party due to financial restraints.
programme.sub-title: Deck the Halls With Bags and Folly

programme.title: Girlfriends: Adapt to Adopt
programme.desc: Maya and Darnell romanticize the idea of adopting until they attend a neighborhood group for people who have adopted children and are offered a baby girl to adopt.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Stand and Deliver
programme.desc: Joan goes to the school where Aaron used to teach in order to read a letter he sent to his former students. However, when Joan arrives, the students give her a hard time so Maya decides to use her street smarts to help Joan get through to the students.

programme.title: Girlfriends: What's Black-A-Lackin'?
programme.desc: Lynn gets upset when she learns that her record label is pushing back the release of her album to promote another artist, Chrisette Michele.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Toe Sucking
programme.desc: Four girlfriends: picky lawyer Joan, gold-digging real estate agent Toni, professional student Lynn, and Joan's headstrong assistant Maya get involved with each other's loves and lives, particularly after Toni starts dating Joan's ex.

programme.title: Girlfriends: One Night Stand
programme.desc: Joan, who hasn't had sex in a year, decides to have a one-night stand with handsome restaurateur Davis.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Hip-Ocracy
programme.desc: Joan, Toni, and Lynn decide to find dates on the Internet. When Joan meets Marcus she thinks he is too good to be true until she finds out he wears a girdle. Toni breaks it off with her date simply because he's too black.

programme.title: Girlfriends: I Pity The Fool
programme.desc: Joan's new boyfriend Marcus has been moving a bit too fast and she realizes her heart was not in the relationship in the first place.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Girlfrenzy
programme.desc: With Maya and Joan becoming close friends, Toni becomes jealous and feels she's losing her best friend.

programme.title: Girlfriends: The Importance of Being Frank
programme.desc: Joan starts dating her client's very attractive accountant Keith, only to be stalked by his estranged wife.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Everything Fishy Ain’t Fish
programme.desc: Joan learns that Maya's husband may be cheating on her and must face whether or not it's a good idea to tell her friend. Toni dates a City Councilman who can help further her career.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Never A Bridesmaid
programme.desc: Maya and her partner Darnell decide they want to renew their vows and have a formal wedding ceremony. Joan offers to help with the event and to have it at her home.

programme.title: Girlfriends: The Remains of the Date
programme.desc: Joan is determined to play the ultimate Halloween prank on William and succeeds. Meanwhile, Toni is left to deal with her dates strange sexual fetish for stuffed animals.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Fried Turkey
programme.desc: On a holiday that emphasizes togetherness, Joan struggles with feelings of loneliness and separation on Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Pregnant Pause
programme.desc: Baby has never been in Joan's vocabulary until she gets the scare of her life and a new perspective on her priorities. As a result, the girls come together to give their love and support, showing their true Girlfriend friendship.

programme.title: Girlfriends: The List
programme.desc: Dreading another dateless weekend, the girls and William try Maya's suggestion to make a list of what they want in a mate.

programme.title: Girlfriends: They’ve Gotta Have It
programme.desc: Joan's new boyfriend Sean has not made a move on her after three weeks of dating and she is beginning to wonder why.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Bad Timing
programme.desc: Joan begins to question her relationship with Sean when he gives her a power drill for Valentine's and doesn't hear from him for three days.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Old Dog
programme.desc: Joan decides it is time to give in on her three-month rule and she is finally going to have sex with her boyfriend Sean.

programme.title: Girlfriends: The Declaration of Lynndependence
programme.desc: Joan and Toni decide that Lynn needs to learn to be independent. They give her a week to find a job, then she is on her own.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Friends, Colleagues, Brothers
programme.desc: Joan discovers that being the only black woman at her firm has many disadvantages and she is constantly ignored and overlooked.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Diss-regard
programme.desc: Maya checks into the hospital for her fibroid surgery and Joan has trouble managing her time between her boyfriend and her friends.

programme.title: Girlfriends: The Burning Vagina Monologues
programme.desc: Joan is stressing because Sean hasn't told her that he loves her.

programme.title: Girlfriends: A Kiss Before Lying
programme.desc: Sean notices that Joan always flirts with Davis. He gets jealous and tells Joan that she can never see Davis again or go back to 847.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Loose Lips Sink Relationships
programme.desc: Joan opens her mouth and tells Greg about Toni and Clay.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Jamaic-Up?
programme.desc: Joan takes the girls to the Sinbad Music Festival to help ease Toni to get over her breakup with Greg.

programme.title: Girlfriends: The Fallout
programme.desc: The ladies return home from their very eventful trip to Jamaica where Joan unintentionally ruined Toni's relationship.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Just Say No
programme.desc: Joan continues to suffer in her troubled friendship with Toni and her new relationship with her therapist, Dr. Bales.

programme.title: Girlfriends: A Full Court Conspiracy
programme.desc: Torn between her two worlds, Joan struggles with her professional duty while at the same time dealing with the guilt that she is not being true to herself or her beliefs.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Un-Treatable
programme.desc: Maya buys a dress that is too expensive knowing it might cause problems with her husband, Darnell. Joan treats herself to a trip to New York to visit her boyfriend, realizing the distance between the two of them is a problem.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Buh-Bye
programme.desc: Joan ends the friendship between her and Toni after finding out that Toni has been discussing her personal life with co-workers behind her back. Meanwhile, Lynn is trying to cope with her new living situation with Vosco, and his lack of a job.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Willie or Won’t He
programme.desc: Yvonne is concerned that William is never going to marry her because they have not set a date for the wedding. When Yvonne asks Joan for advice, Joan tries her best to stay out of it but ends up telling Yvonne to move in with William first to try it out.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Joan’s Birthday Suit
programme.desc: For her thirtieth birthday, Joan finds that she is happy with who she is, yet finds that she’s not so happy that her father is a nudist.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Trick or Truth?
programme.desc: When Toni loses her friend Joan, her man, and her gold card, it’s up to Maya and Lynn to help her get her life back together.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Maya Takes a Stan
programme.desc: Due to marital tensions at home, an emotionally fragile Maya finds herself falling into a fantasy affair with a handsome and empathetic new friend, Stan.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Mom’s the Word
programme.desc: Toni meets a great man but is dumped after she’s a bad influence on his eight-year-old daughter. Joan dates a movie star but is dumped when he begins to think she’s stalking him.

programme.desc: A reporter attempts to save a future union boss who is a murder target.

programme.title: The A-Team

programme.desc: Murdock is made a god on an island where the natives mine diamonds.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: A girl runs away with her father's top-secret documents.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: The A-Team uncovers a plot to assassinate an attorney general.

programme.title: The A-Team

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: Hannibal and the A-Team rescue a young girl held captive by a violent religious cult.

programme.desc: Hannibal and his men get together to break B.A.'s friend out of a southern jail, where prisoners are forced to fight to the death.

programme.title: The A-Team

programme.title: The A-Team

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Making her first British chat-show appearance in 42 years, Dame Maggie Smith with Alex Jennings, four-time Oscar-nominated Bradley Cooper, British star Sienna Miller with chat and music from Justin Bieber.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: On Graham's festive sofa are: football legend David Beckham, from `Star Wars: The Force Awakens', Princess Leia herself Carrie Fisher and new stars Daisy Ridley and John Boyega, and pop superstar Kylie Minogue, who chats and sings.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Graham is joined by Dame Judi Dench, Dev Patel, Sharon Horgan, Rob Delaney, Jack O'Connell and First Aid Kit.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Graham is joined by Eurovision winner Conchita Wurst, cycling ace Sir Bradley Wiggins and Hollywood stars Eddie Redmayne, Anna Kendrick, and Liam Neeson.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: On the sofa are Diane Keaton talking about the movie `Hampstead', Jessica Chastain in `Miss Sloane', Kevin Bacon in the series `I Love Dick', and Michael Fassbender reprising his role in `Alien: Covenant'. Plus, Gorillaz perform `We Got the Power'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Among the guests on Graham's sofa are comic actor Stephen Mangan from new TV show `Hang Ups', and music from Jess Glynne, who performs her new single `I'll Be There'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Among the guests on Graham's sofa tonight: Hollywood megastar Harrison Ford, starring in new sci-fi adventure `Ender's Game'; top comedian Jack Whitehall; and music and chat from James Blunt, who performs `Bonfire Heart'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Together on Graham's sofa are Hollywood legend Meryl Streep, British actress Carey Mulligan, co-starring in new British drama `Suffragette', actress Nicole Kidman, domestic goddess Nigella Lawson, and music from rising British star Gabrielle Aplin.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Together on Graham's sofa are Oscar-winner Anne Hathaway, actresses Rebel Wilson and Jodie Comer, and actor Daniel Radcliffe. With music from Mabel, who performs her single `Don't Call Me Up'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Joining Graham on the sofa this time are `Great British Bake-Off' star Paul Hollywood, actor and writer Dame Joan Collins, and `Cinderella' co-stars Lily James and Richard Madden. Plus, music from DNCE, performing `Cake By the Ocean'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Horizon Zero
programme.desc: A high profile mission to Mars is suddenly canceled, much to the dismay of the public. Involved air force captain Paul Chandler steals Lili's shuttle.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Scopions Dream
programme.desc: Dr. Larry Clark is a bio engineer who works on the skrills. When the companions decide to get rid of a series, one of them joins with Clark.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Live Free or Die
programme.desc: Navy Seal major Raymond McIntyre kidnaps Da'an and demands to know where his men are. They were involved in a inter-dimensional space flight test that went wrong.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: The Scarecrow Returns
programme.desc: Research continues on the 'scarecrow' probe. Boone starts learning Taelon to interpret its messages. The device meanwhile absorbs a scientist, Rayna.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Sandoval's Run
programme.desc: Sandoval's CVI is breaking down. While Dr. Belman tries to remove it before implanting a new one, Sandoval escapes. He wants to rescue his wife DeeDee.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: The Secret of Standhill
programme.desc: An Irish guide finds the possible burial location of Ma'el, a Taelon that came to Earth 2000 years ago. It is crucial for the Taelons to find his research material.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Pandora's Box
programme.desc: While Boone is haunted by hallucinations of captain Lucas Johnson, the Taelon Rho'ha is to undergo a experiment of experiencing human emotions.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: If You Could Read my Mind
programme.desc: The Taelon Commonality is invaded and psychic Katya Petrenko is the prime suspect. She tells Boone she knows about his secret activities and needs him.
programme.sub-title: If You Could Read my Mind

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Wrath of Achilles
programme.desc: The resistance releases a virus of Augur on the Taelon headquarters in Washington. Things get out of hand.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: The Devil You Know
programme.desc: While a dying colonel implants his brain in a deceased criminal, the Taelons show a new electromagnetic pulse weapon. Jonathan Doors wishes to acquire it.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Law and Order
programme.desc: The Synod agrees to let Rho'ha be charged with murder in a human court. He will be prosecuted by Joshua Doors, the son of Jonathan Doors.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Through the Looking Glass
programme.desc: A new inter-dimensional portal system for human travel turns out to be something more when the resistance discover a CVI in a boy who got lost in the system.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Infection
programme.desc: Ne'eg is killed by a bacteria that is both deadly to Taelons and Humans. If it spreads, it might be disastrous. A new racist group attacks a community center.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Destruction
programme.desc: The Liberation sends a team to destroy the scarecrow probe before the Taelons crack it. Joshua Doors is appointed as secretary of Human-Taelon relations.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: The Joining
programme.desc: An excavation team unleashes a very dangerous Taelon on Earth. Siobhan Beckett comes over to America. She suspects Lili of being a spy and investigates.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: First of its Kind
programme.desc: Following Boone's confrontation with Hegel that left him severely injured, he was eliminated by Zo'or. Beckett who was impregnated by Hegel gives birth to a boy who immediately grows up to a man.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Avatus
programme.desc: Da'an looses his contact with the the Taelon Commonality. This causes him to change and Zo'or instructs that Da'an must be killed; because he's now considered a threat.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: A Stitch in Time
programme.desc: An exhibition for the first arrival of the Taelons showcases different artifacts. An artifact causes Liam to travel to an alternate time. Zo'or questions how Da'an was able to rejoin the Commonality.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Dimensions
programme.desc: Liam and Augur are in a Taelon shuttle craft, when something happens they get thrown into a parallel universe. They discover that humanity is at war with the Taelons.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Moonscape
programme.desc: Augur is forced to take part in a Taelon experiment. Da'an and Liam try to convince Zo'or that altering minds and implanting humans to make them aggressive to fight the Jaridians is not the correct path. Maiya makes contact with Sandoval.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: The Sleepers
programme.desc: A Jaridian probe lands on Earth and begins sucking energy from the Comonality. The Taelons use humans in a near-death state to keep their connection while Lili and Sandoval try to find out what is draining the energy.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: David Barby and Margie Cooper embark on day three of the road trip from Bridlington to Sheffield, and on their way they buy some surprising items.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts Mark Stacey and Mark Hales battle it out in the auction rooms and antiques shops of eastern England in a race to turn an unbeatable profit.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Road trippers Mark Stacey and Mark Hales head for East Anglia in their classic car as the battle to win intensifies between them.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.desc: Catherine and Vincent track a mysterious beast while keeping their individual agendas from one another in a clever game of cat-and-mouse.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: After getting stonewalled by Cat in his quest to track down a suspected beast, Gabe enlists Vincent’s help, but Vincent quickly takes matters into his own hands.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: Cat gets a blast from the past as she attends her high school reunion, where she uncovers more of her past than she ever anticipated.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: Cat confronts her birth father about the mysterious role he’s played in her life, while Vincent has to neutralize a high-profile beast.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: After Vincent’s life is endangered, Cat decides they should spend Thanksgiving with her father in order to get information on Vincent’s missions.

programme.title: Poltergeist: The Legacy
programme.desc: When Nick's friend, Laura Davis, relocates from New York to San Francisco, she finds herself living in a house haunted by a suicide victim. And after holding a séance, she needs the Legacy's help to free herself from the woman's conjured spirit.

programme.title: Poltergeist: The Legacy
programme.desc: When a Native American boy is born prematurely, his father entrusts him to a shaman who protects him with a shadow spirit in order to save his life. Now a teen, the boy finds himself threatened by the very spirit that was meant to protect him.

programme.title: Poltergeist: The Legacy
programme.desc: Jeffrey Starr is a paranormal fraudster who dupes his customers out of their life’s savings by telling them what they want to hear, no matter how outrageous it is. The Legacy group must intervene when one of Jeffrey's premonitions comes true.

programme.title: Poltergeist: The Legacy
programme.desc: To help a friend, Rachel investigates a sanitarium where unexplained deaths are occurring at an alarming rate, and comes to realize that there is a fine line between imagination and reality when she must face her own fears to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Poltergeist: The Legacy
programme.desc: Derek is contacted from beyond the grave by an old friend, Spencer Croft. Spencer's sudden and inexplicable death magically restores the health of his ailing wife, Serena, but also leaves her vulnerable to the lure of the demonic Underworld.

programme.title: Poltergeist: The Legacy
programme.desc: While transporting an artifact from a grave in France, the Precept of the London Legacy house, William Sloan, finds himself in mortal danger when his plane crashes, and the vengeful spirit of a long-dead French Baron is unwittingly released.

programme.title: Poltergeist: The Legacy
programme.desc: On a stormy night, Derek is inexplicably overcome by an urgency to check the chest containing the demon which killed his father 33 years ago. When he suddenly becomes possessed by the spirit of his father, Derek may himself open the Gates of Hell.

programme.title: Poltergeist: The Legacy
programme.desc: After re-living her past experiences with the group, Doctor Rachel Corrigan (Helen Shaver) feels compelled to take her daughter and leave the Legacy so that she and Kat can lead a normal life...one without violence and strife of the Dark Side.

programme.title: Poltergeist: The Legacy
programme.desc: Derek's old friend, Damon Ballard, facing divorce from his wife Lisa, is charged with abusing his ten-year-old son Michael. The police give no credence to Damon's claim that an invisible force attacked them both; so he turns to the Legacy team.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: Vincent and Cat find themselves at odds on how to deal with Agent Reynolds, which forces Vincent to wonder if he is more beast than man.

programme.title: Matlock: The Widow
programme.desc: A newlywed is charged with murder.

programme.title: Matlock: The Doctors
programme.desc: Doctors find themselves accused of murder.

programme.title: Matlock: The Billionaire (Part 1)
programme.desc: Matlock discovers he has more than enough suspects to go around for a murder which has the wrong man is in jail.

programme.title: Matlock: The Billionaire (Part 2)
programme.desc: Matlock discovers he has more than enough suspects to go around for a murder which has the wrong man in jail.

programme.title: Matlock: Blind Justice
programme.desc: Matlock must break a seemingly perfect defense when Arthur Hampton, a blind sculptor, shoots the man responsible for his loss of sight. After waiting many years, Hampton finally takes his revenge on Clay Graham, the playboy responsible for his blindness.

programme.title: Matlock: Annihilator
programme.desc: Matlock treads on unfamiliar turf when he spearheads an investigation to defend a popular wrestler, known as The Annihilator when he is accused of killing Sailor Jack, his nemesis in the ring.

programme.title: Matlock: Network
programme.desc: Matlock defends Paul J. Bartel, a top TV producer accused of murdering the programming chief at the top-rated network, and finds the case has more twists than most Hollywood scripts.

programme.title: Matlock: Best Friend
programme.desc: When a renowned author is murdered, Matlock defends the accused – the subject of a biography the victim was writing – only to encounter a disturbing revelation about his client midway through the trial.

programme.title: Matlock: Christmas Show
programme.desc: Matlock serves double duty: defending Brian Emerson, who’s charged with killing his ex-wife, and babysitting Emerson’s 6-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Matlock: The Body
programme.desc: Ben Matlock learns there is more to an exclusive health spa than workouts when his client, Donna Stewart, is accused of murdering a sexy, young exercise instructor who had been having an affair with her husband.

programme.title: Matlock: The Reunion
programme.desc: A law school class reunion proves deadly for one of Matlock’s former classmates, and Ben takes on the defense of another old friend, George Dutton, the partner of the victim.

programme.title: Matlock: The Umpire
programme.desc: Matlock attempts to defend Charlie Bonham, a softball coach who is accused of killing the umpire – who was also his boss – during the league’s playoff game.

programme.title: Matlock: Investigation (Part 1)
programme.desc: Matlock is surprised to learn that his long-time client, respected businessman Craig Gentry, is the son of mob boss Sam Gerard. The ace attorney must defend Craig of the murder of a senator who was investigating organized crime.

programme.title: Matlock: Investigation (Part 2)
programme.desc: Matlock has his hands full defending his client, Craig Gentry, while also trying to prevent a full-scale mob war from breaking out between Craig’s father and two of his enemies.

programme.title: Matlock: The Hucksters
programme.desc: Matlock is hired to defend Hal Simpson, an irate investor accused of murdering Robert Ullman, the smooth-talking owner of Fountain of Youth Elixir Creams, who was really promoting a phony get-rich-quick scheme.

programme.title: Matlock: The Lovelorn
programme.desc: When the popular writer of an advice-to-the-lovelorn column is murdered, Matlock discovers a house full of problems and suspects.

programme.title: Matlock: The Genius
programme.desc: Ben Matlock’s nephew, Dr. Irwin Bruckner, is accused of murdering his boss, the director of a top-security think tank, and Matlock’s defense seems doomed to failure unless a master computer can be outsmarted.

programme.title: Matlock: The Magician
programme.desc: Matlock discovers he has more than one tricky suspect to contend with as he tries to defend magician Daniel Fontaine who’s accused of murdering Sandy Farrell, his ambitious and unfaithful assistant.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: With 248 elite American soldiers on board, Arrow Air Flight #1285 refuels in Newfoundland but just seconds after taking off, the plane crashes igniting a storm of controversy.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Investigators suspect there was a bomb on board Continental Express Flight #2574, but when the theory is dismissed, they eventually reveal a chilling story of good intentions gone horribly wrong.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Eight Manchester United football players are killed in a notorious Munich plane crash and when the surviving pilot is blamed, his struggle to clear his name spans more than two decades.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: When the rudder fails, the pilots of Northwest Airlines Flight #85 barely get their crippled 747 to Anchorage, Alaska for an emergency landing.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: After less than a minute in the air, Korean Air Cargo Flight #8509 slams into a field northeast of London. It is the airline’s fifth major accident in two years.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Just minutes from landing in San Diego, PSA Flight #182 collides with a Cessna and both planes crash into a quiet residential neighborhood below.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Minutes after taking off from Saudi Arabia’s Jeddah airport, Nigeria Airways Flight #2120 erupts into a fireball, killing all 261 people on board.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Gunshots are heard in the cabin of Pacific Southwest Airlines Flight #1771 and moments later the aircraft crashes into a remote California field.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Touching down on a narrow grass levee, the pilots of TACA Flight #110 manage one of the most remarkable landings in the history of commercial aviation.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: SAS Flight #686 lifts off in heavy fog at Milan’s Linate Airport but moments later collides with a Cessna on the runway. It is the worst accident in Italian aviation history.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: United Airlines Flight #232 is crippled when one of its three engines explodes, completely knocking out the hydraulic system and making it impossible to steer.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Just out of Honolulu the cargo door of United Airlines Flight 811 opens at an altitude of 33,000 feet, ripping a huge hole in the 747 taking out five rows of seats – and nine passengers with it.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: At the height of thunderstorm season in Arkansas, American Airlines 1420 ends in disaster. The MD80 ploughs off a wet runway down an embankment and breaks apart, killing 11 people.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: The pilot of Swissair Flight 111 smells smoke in the cockpit. Minutes later fire and complete electrical failure cause the MD11 to crash into the Atlantic killing all 229 passengers and crew on board.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Aeroperu Flight 603 bound from Lima, Peru to Santiago, Chile shows how a simple error and a lack of flight crew training can bring a giant, complex airliner to a deadly end.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Shortly after Air Alaska Flight 261 takes off, the stabilizer malfunctions. The pilots struggle to control the plane and it dives into the ocean. The eighty-eight passengers and crew on board die.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: An Air Transat Airbus runs out of fuel over the Atlantic and has to glide to a power-free landing.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: The windshield of British Airways Flight 111 has popped off and the captain has been sucked out. The sound of the wind is deafening and the co-pilot can’t hear the replies from air traffic controllers

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: There are pool problems for the Brit owners of a French campsite, there’s a rude awakening for a couple running a bed & breakfast in the desert programme, and a mix up at a Spanish restaurant puts a big event in jeopardy.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: At a Brit-run bed & breakfast in Spain, there’s a final push to finish the pool in time for guests. Can a campsite in French complete renovations on a static caravan? And on the Costa del Sol, there’s an unhappy diner at a restaurant.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Meet the Brits racing to open an unusual restaurant in Spain. A young Kent couple living in France make sacrifices to keep their dreams alive. And in Andalusia, a Brit struggles being a single mum with running her new hotel.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Can a new restaurant in Spain meet the opening deadline? A hotelier in Spain searches for a new property, and two gite owners in France give up their cosy home to live in a barn!

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: We meet a young British couple as they open their glamping site in France. It’s opening day for a Spanish restaurant, and could a nest of bees hamper building works in the Dordogne?

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: We are on board an expat charter boat in Mallorca as they launch new plans to secure their future, the British owners of a Spanish restaurant must rethink their business model, and a French glamping site struggle with some unwanted guests.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A British-run charter boat business in Mallorca has a very important guests on board. The expat owners of a new Spanish restaurant reflect on their first season, and have two former navy pilots made a success of their French glamping site.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: We meet a couple from the Wirral as they take over a bed & breakfast in rural Spain. Two Brits from Milton Keynes race to open their new dive centre on the Med, and a pair of vineyard owners from Hereford open up a holiday complex in the Dordogne.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Can a couple of expats from the Northwest of England open their dive school in Spain? Two new Brit bed & breakfast owners struggle following a power cut in rural Spain, and we’re on a French vineyard run by a couple from Hereford.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A couple of bed & breakfast owners from the Wirral end up roughing it in Spain following a bumper booking. Two vineyard owners from Hereford try out their culinary skills, and a couple from Warrington move to Spain to open a cycle retreat.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Two British vineyard owners try to beat the French during a Boules tournament, a couple from Warrington struggle to find a Spanish villa for their business, and there are nautical nightmares for a Brit-run dive school.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Its harvest day for the Hereford couple running a French vineyard, a couple from the Northwest welcome a VIP to their new cycling retreat in Spain, and a couple of dive enthusiasts from Milton Keynes end their first season in Spain on a high.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A Norfolk couple move their soap-making business to southern Spain, the season kicks off for the British owners of a holiday complex in France, and bad news hit a Brit-owned adventure business in Mallorca as their bookings take a plunge.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A Brit confronts her staff at an adventure company in Mallorca, two rookie restaurateurs from Kent go into meltdown in France, and an English couple living in Almeria fears the effects of Brexit.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A holiday home business in France struggles with expensive maintenance costs. In Mallorca, a British-run adventure company deals with a very nervous cliff jumper, a couple of Brits in Spain spend two years’ worth of savings in eight weeks.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A spectacular new excursion brings big earnings to a British run adventure company in Mallorca, a couple of expat-wannabe-caterers in France struggle to feed the crowds, and a couple from Essex open a glamping site in France.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: At a glamping site in France, mouldy tents cause worries for the British owners. The owners of a Mallorcan adventure company make a massive investment, and there’s a godsend for two British restaurateurs in France.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A Norfolk couple moves to a picturesque French village to take over the only hotel, a Northumberland chef’s dream to open a restaurant in Mallorca, and two Belfast twenty-somethings gamble all their savings on buying a bar on the Costa del Sol.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A young couple from Belfast get more customers than they bargained for in Spain. The opening of a restaurant in France is in serious jeopardy, and renovations in a British-run restaurant in Mallorca prove more difficult than the owners ever thought.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: The Norfolk owners of a French hotel must call for reinforcements. In Mallorca, after a few exhausting weeks, a family from the Northeast finally opens their restaurant, and it’s crunch time for bar owners on the Costa del Sol when their chef quits.

programme.title: Game Changers
programme.desc: Three of the most iconic board games ever made all have unusual histories of origin and ownership.

programme.title: Game Changers
programme.desc: Taking concepts and ideas from the first ever video game, Nolan Bushnell founded Atari and helps create both the commercial video game and home console gaming industries. Starting with the game “Pong” paving the way to Pac Man.

programme.title: Game Changers
programme.desc: From an obscure Japanese playing card maker, to the most recognizable video game company on Earth. Nintendo changed the game, and the world… a Super Mario World!

programme.title: Game Changers
programme.desc: Sega enters its do or die period with the launch of their 6 bit Genesis and levels the playing field against a certain Italian Plumber with a brand new mascot of their own.

programme.title: Game Changers
programme.desc: Tech pioneer Trip Hawkins and his company Electronic Arts collaborate with legendary coach and sports commentator John Madden to create what would become what the most considered to be greatest football video game of all time.

programme.title: Game Changers
programme.desc: The battle to create Call of Duty began not in the trenches of Europe... but in the boardrooms of Hollywood, thanks to director (and gamer!) Steven Spielberg.

programme.title: Game Changers

programme.title: Game Changers

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.desc: Bob Kane and Bill Finger’s costumed hero leaped off the page and onto the screen in 1966, but it wasn’t the dark detective fans anticipated.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.desc: With an injured star, a troublesome vehicle, and an unyielding suit production is off to a rocky start. Can the producers and director work out their differences to land this dark superhero film? Or will disputes over the ending drop them all off a tower?
programme.sub-title: My Smile is Just Skin Deep

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.desc: After the success of Batman 89, the studio was ready for round two, but their director was not. Given free reign, Burton and his handpicked team went wild. But would his dark vision scare away their target audience?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.desc: A new director brings his own colorful aesthetic, but who is really in charge? A fraught production drives away his star yet delivers the toy friendly Batman the studio wanted. But when the sequel goes over the top, the franchise hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.desc: To revive a dying franchise, the studio gives the keys to the Batmobile to an indie director whose origin story and grounded aesthetic promised to resuscitate their hero.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Incognito
programme.desc: Retrieving a mythical lancet, Sydney and Nigel run into Nigel's look-alike just before his death. Nigel gets a cut from the lancet. Later, Cate persuades Nigel to impersonate the man.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: All Choked Up
programme.desc: Carson Inez, a collector, uses an ancient necklace to get Sydney to help her in raising Athena who will then help her conquer the world.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Warlock of Nu Theta Phi
programme.desc: When Sydney's student Meg's roommate finds a witch's amulet, it hospitalizes Meg. Meg's boyfriend's fraternity brother races to get the amulet. What is he up to?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Fire in the Sky
programme.desc: While Sydney is lecturing about the Native Americans who faced a mysterious cataclysm 600 years earlier, a native brings her a relic from that era. What is its secret?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Hunting with the Enemy
programme.desc: An urn commissioned in a Cambodian monastery by the Chinese emperor for the remains of Confucius is about to be destroyed by systematic bombing of a whole province.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Under the Ice
programme.desc: Despite terrible weather, Sidney drags Nigel along to an Arctic base where an ancient Indian mummy has been found, who turns out to be an Anasazi.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Antianeirai
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel travel to Istanbul to investigate the death of one Sydney's friends, a professor who was trying to prove Hercules did exist by finding the Belt of Hippolyte.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Faux Fox
programme.desc: When Nigel is charmed by brilliant student Lorraine to show her their offices (and kiss), a burglar knocks out Sidney, but what was robbed?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Pandora's Box
programme.desc: Sidney inherits from the best relic hunter of the previous generation a key and rushes with Nigel on the hunt for the one treasure he never found: Pandora's box.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Warlord
programme.desc: Bekkastan, 1401 AD: warrior princess Kahina proves her right to rule. 2002: Sydney and Nigel unearth a cave painting that might lead them to Kahina's Saddle. But her descendants cause complications.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Fountain of Youth
programme.desc: While Nigel rehearses his keynote speech in a Seville hotel room, a girl nearly breaks his nose demanding something - it turns out she was after the water from the Fountain of Youth.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Arthur's Cross
programme.desc: Scotland Yard calls Sidney and Nigel to identify a 5th century murder weapon. It turns out to be the burial cross of King Arthur, but besides the victim several others are looking for it.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: So Shall It Be
programme.desc: When Sidney and Nigel are about to enter the site of a Bristol lecture, a young author approaches them to follow up immediately on a tip about a map to the lost keys to the druid cult in Stonehenge.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Buddha's Bowl
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel head to Nepal to recover Buddha's fabled overflowing alms bowl for villagers who are building a shrine to the original Buddha.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Headless Nun
programme.desc: When Sydney's plane crashes, she's asked by a group of nuns to find the head of another nun who was decapitated several centuries ago.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Smoking Gun
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel search for Al Capone's diamond-encrusted gun at the behest of a man hoping it will clear his grandfather of a murder he was framed for.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Affaire de Coeur
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel go to Scotland to find the second ring of the pair of Twining Rings of Calum and Elena.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Thank You Very Much
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel go to Germany to find a lost Elvis Presley guitar.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Transformation
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel and Derek Lloyd go to the Peruvian jungle to look for the Paracelsus scrolls which contain the formula for turning lead into gold.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Hack Green Bunker
programme.desc: Gregg enters the bunker for the first time and feels its energy. Has he caught the voice of the mysterious woman that some believe was murdered there?

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Eden Camp Museum
programme.desc: Once a prison camp during WWII, Eden Camp is now a museum housing many an artefact and many a ghost. Karl enters the cottage to face the spirits that are said to haunt this once family home.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Hickleton Hall
programme.desc: Once a grand mansion, this huge property is now very much passed it previous grandeur. Stuart investigates the long empty corridors alone and something seems to be following him.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Hack Green Nuclear Bunker
programme.desc: Karl and Stuart head to Hack Green Bunker and witness, first hand, the paranormal activity that regularly occurs there.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Charlton House
programme.desc: Karl investigates Carlton house library for the first time and quickly realises that he is not alone.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Borwick Hall P1
programme.desc: Karl enters Borwick Hall for the first time as he investigates the upper floors.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Borwick Hall P2
programme.desc: Our investigation into Borwick Hall continues as Stuart investigates the middle floors.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Pen-Y-Lan House P1
programme.desc: Karl investigates the outbuildings of this large estate, where many people have witnessed strange occurrences, some he is about to witness first-hand.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Pen-Y-Lan House P2
programme.desc: Stuart investigates the main house alone, although it isn’t long before he feels something is there with him.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Bishton Hall
programme.desc: Yvette takes Glen and Mary into the incredibly haunted Bishton Hall. They start in the upper floors and work their way down to the cellars, but is something following them.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Margam Castle P1
programme.desc: Karl investigates the ground floor back rooms of this landmark castle alone, but soon realises that something is lurking in the shadows.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Margam Castle P2
programme.desc: The upper floors of Margam Castle are said to be haunted by many different spirits, Stuart goes it alone to try and find them.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Dorchester Prison 2 P1
programme.desc: Said to be the Most Haunted prison in the UK, HMP Dorchester is a scary place to be with a group of people but alone it becomes terrifying. Karl investigates the upper cells and gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Dorchester Prison 2 P2
programme.desc: Stuart enters the underbelly of this remarkable building and starts to witness some very strange occurrences.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Armely Mills Cottage
programme.desc: The cottage on the site of Armley Mills is said to be full of paranormal activity so Karl decides to enter, alone and witnesses something that is eager to grab his attention.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Shrewsbury Prison
programme.desc: Abandoned prisons are always a daunting prospect and the Most Haunted team love them. This time Karl takes on HMP Shrewsbury alone and experiences some of the unhappy phantoms that lurk in the shadows.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Samlesbury Hall P1
programme.desc: With a history dating back to 1185, Salmesbury Hall is of the UK’s most historic buildings and said to be one of the most haunted. With ghost stories and sightings all over the building, Stuart investigates the ground floor.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Samlesbury Hall P2
programme.desc: Karl investigates the upper floors of this historic building dating back to 1185, and realises he is not alone.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Gressenhall Workhouse Pt1
programme.desc: Karl investigates the very haunted school room in the large imposing Gressenhall Workhouse. The activity starts even before Karl gets into the building and becomes one of the most impressive investigations to date.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Gressenhall Workhouse Pt2
programme.desc: Stuart investigates two buildings, a forge and the cottage. He could not have imagined the activity that unfolded around him.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Bishton Hall P1
programme.desc: Stuart investigates the main house and seems to be pulled in different directions from an unexplained energy.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Bishton Hall P2
programme.desc: Karl ventures down into the cellars of this large country house and soon comes under attack from an unseen force.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Karl enters a Masonic Temple alone, seeking the truth behind its eerie reputation. The mysterious world of Freemasonry soon reveals a chilling presence in the shadows.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Cameras are left locked-off in haunted sites across the country, capturing chilling activity in a bold experiment with some truly remarkable results.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Karl enters the formidable HMP Gloucester and sets up an experiment with some amazing results.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Karl and Stuart explore Birmingham's Coffin Works, a hotspot of eerie activity. On the top floor, where burial shrouds were made, something unseen seems keen on making tea.

programme.title: Monkey

programme.title: Monkey

programme.desc: The pilgrims meet Golden Horn and Silver Horn. Pigsy is bewitched, Monkey is tested by an old woman, and Tripitaka and Sandy are captured. A Taoist magician turns the tide when Golden Horn loses his magic bottle.

programme.desc: Today, we’ve got a guest who has lived several lives in one. On the pitch, he was a fierce left-back who collected trophies like kids collect Pokémon cards. Off the pitch, he’s become the man of Monday mornings.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside is caught in the middle of a bank robbery organized by a newly released convict (Don Stroud); guest Whit Bissell.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A scandal magazine prints a desperate woman's (Dorothy Malone) stories about her many nights with Ironside; guest William Schallert.
programme.sub-title: Confessions: From a Lady of the Night

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside investigates the fatal shooting of the son of Fran's divorced friend (Mary Ure); guests Clu Gulager, Herb Edelman.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside has a chance encounter with an old flame (Dana Wynter) who plans steal a jade tiger the chief is guarding.
programme.sub-title: In the Forests of the Night

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A badly beaten attorney (James Olson) describes an unconscious man aboard a sinking boat.
programme.sub-title: Fragile Is the House of Cards

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A top-security scientist disappears and Ironside discovers an unexplained $50,000 in his bank account.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A couple (Sharon Gless, Russell Wiggins) disappears while throwing a "haunted house" party in an abandoned mansion.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside is accidentally tipped to an organization that is illegally supplying Mexican domestics to U.S. families.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside pretends to quit the force and poses as a Skid Row derelict to trap a killer; guest Kim Darby.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A nightclub psychic (Ross Martin) knows more than the newspapers about a fatal fire; guest Louise Sorel.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Vengeful mobsters stalk an ex-POW (Cliff Potts) searching frantically for his supposedly dead police-officer father.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A paid informant's (Allen Garfield) cover is blown, endangering his wife and daughter; guests Albert Salmi, Nancy Malone.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: After a friend is beaten, Mark is the bait to trap the attackers' loan-shark boss; guests Scatman Crothers, Albert Popwell.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Lt. Reese falls under suspicion after the disappearance of heroin intended as evidence against a mob boss.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A con artist (Michael Bell) kidnaps a captured bank robber's (Paul Burke) child and demands the loot as ransom.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A rock guitarist is electrocuted while Ironside looks for music pirates; guests Pamela Bellwood, Roger Davis, Judy Carne.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: An invitation to Ironside's class reunion contains one classmate's suggestion that her husband was murdered; guest Anne Francis.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A wealthy widow's (Kim Hunter) son (James Keach) is found dead shortly before his supposedly dead sister (Gretchen Corbett) reappears.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Attempts are made on a professor's (Michael Parks) life after he is mentioned on a tape left behind by a student who committed suicide.

programme.title: NEW Murdertown With Anita Rani
programme.desc: With first-hand testimony from family members, police officers, witnesses and reporters, we shine a light on some of Britain's darkest murder locations, examining the crimes that rocked these communities.

programme.title: NEW Murdertown With Anita Rani
programme.desc: With first-hand testimony from family members, police officers, witnesses and reporters, we shine a light on some of Britain's darkest murder locations, examining the crimes that rocked these communities.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Emilia travels to the Yorkshire town of Rotherham to uncover the details of a horrific double murder separated by more than two decades. In April 2019 the body of Alena Grlakova was discovered by police after she had gone missing on Boxing Day.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: In May 1996 the murder of Stephen Cameron hit newspaper headlines as one of the first examples in the UK of a road rage killing. Emilia visits the town of Swanley to uncover the details of this tragic case.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: In April 2015, 24-year-old student Karen Buckley went missing while on a night out in Glasgow. Emilia visits the location where Karen was last seen, the Sanctuary nightclub, and learns about the investigation that tried to find her.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Emilia visits Peterborough, where a young woman, Sally Ann McGrath, went missing in 1979, having last been seen in the city centre. It took nearly eight months for her body to be found, after police assumed she had simply run away.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: The quiet seaside town of Mablethorpe was an unlikely location for what appeared to be an organised hit on a couple in their 50s. Emilia travels to the Lincolnshire coast to learn about the violent murders of Joan and John Stirland in 2004.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Jordan Monaghan comes under suspicion when his girlfriend is found dead. After all, he is already linked to two other suspicious deaths. Is he a serial killer?

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Emilia uncovers details surrounding the brutal murder of Rosie Darbyshire. Witnesses and CCTV were key to solving the case which shocked the local communit

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Chatham: Emilia uncovers details surrounding Joshua Stimpson's murder of ex-girlfriend Molly McLaren, a case which shook the victim's family and community to its core

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Emilia examines three murders which shook Beenham in the 1960s. One of the murders went unsolved for 40 years, until detectives vowed to finally seek justice.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Emilia looks into the killing of Martin Decker, who had been bludgeoned with a hammer. Police would link the murder to a suspect dubbed the NR3 cat killer.

programme.title: Murdertown: Hull
programme.desc: When a young woman goes missing on Valentine’s Day, detectives turn to a pollen expert, who pieces together fragments of evidence to find her body.

programme.title: Murdertown: Dartford
programme.desc: In 1993, 16-year-old Claire Tiltman is found dying by the roadside. Her killer disappears into the night. More than 20 years later, Colin Ash Smith is finally brought to trial. Jurors hear of how he knew Claire, and even went to her funeral.

programme.title: Murdertown: Dundee
programme.desc: Aged 15, Robbie McIntosh walked into a fish and chip shop to announce that a woman had been killed on the iconic Law Hill. Police revealed the victim had been stabbed dozens of times. But they never imagined that the culprit was the teenager.

programme.title: Murdertown: Barnsley
programme.desc: In 2015, a 69-year-old man is found stabbed in his home. At the scene, forensics uncover a receipt from a nearby cashpoint. CCTV at the bank reveals a woman using the victim's card to withdraw cash. Who is she? And how does she relate to the murder?

programme.title: Revenge of the Pink Panther
programme.desc: Peter Sellers’ comedic genius shines when the hapless Inspector Clouseau is presumed to be dead. However, the very much alive Inspector travels to Hong Kong to investigate a dangerous drug lord (Robert Webber). Dyan Cannon and Herbert Lom also star.

programme.title: Trail of the Pink Panther
programme.desc: This tribute to the late Peter Sellers contains unused scenes from the previous Pink Panther films interspersed with new footage and features a great comedic cast.

programme.title: Curse of the Pink Panther
programme.desc: Inspector Clouseau is missing and the Pink Panther (David Niven) is hot on his trail in this wildly funny laugh-fest that offers plenty of slapstick humor and a myriad of stars including Joanna Lumley, Herbert Lom and Robert Wagner.

programme.title: Son Of The Pink Panther
programme.desc: Blake Edwards directs this romantic high-adventure that has Inspector Clouseau's illegitimate (and alarmingly similar!) son (Roberto Benigni) botching a mission to rescue a kidnapped princess (Debrah Farentino).

programme.title: The Pink Panther
programme.desc: Comic icon Steve Martin steps into the shoes of the late Peter Sellers and wonderfully reprises the role of the bumbling, world famous Inspector Jacques Clouseau in this remake of Blake Edwards comedy classic, The Pink Panther.

programme.title: The Pink Panther 2
programme.desc: Inspector Jacques Clouseau teams up with a squad of international detectives just as bumbling as he is. Their mission: Stop a globe-trotting thief who specializes in stealing historical artifacts.

programme.title: The Pink Panther
programme.desc: In this riotously funny farce, Peter Sellers introduced the world to Jacques Clouseau, the clumsiest Inspector ever to trip over a case, who is out to stop the notorious Phantom (David Niven) from stealing the priceless Pink Panther diamond!

programme.title: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: Peter Sellers and Elke Sommer star in this successful sequel to The Pink Panther in which Inspector Clouseau tries to prove a beautiful parlor maid is innocent of killing her chauffer lover.

programme.title: Return of the Pink Panther
programme.desc: The hilarious, accidentally brilliant Inspector Clouseau once again takes on his archenemy, the insane Dreyfus, as he plots to control the world.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Addicted to Rage
programme.desc: Katie Socci stands by her fiancé, David, even after he's charged with stealing narcotics. But once she finally throws him out, he unleashes the deadly fury of a stalker scorned.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Hopelessly Devoted
programme.desc: When Kaia Anderson is kind to fellow student Robert, she never imagined it will lead to a lifelong obsession that won't be stopped by reason or the law.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: A Virtual Nightmare
programme.desc: Up-and-coming pop star Elle Richardson is bombarded with threatening emails from a stranger hell-bent on destroying her career and ruining her life.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Gamble with Death
programme.desc: After Donna Eskew calls off her romance with Glen, he corners Donna in a casino parking lot with a chilling threat. She'll have to use all her wits to stay alive.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Stealth Stalker
programme.desc: When Terri Mendez breaks up with Jose, she doesn't know he's watching every move she makes. When Terri discovers hidden cameras in her bedroom, she realizes there's nowhere to hide.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: A Mother's Nightmare
programme.desc: When Jessica takes out a restraining order against her ex-husband, he vows to get her back. When police won't protect her, Jessica is left to face the horrors that will change her life forever.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Arbitrary Assassins
programme.desc: In November 1996, Raymond Collin went missing in his hometown of Timmins, Ontario. The discovery of his body days later in a snow-covered truck led police to an assortment of possible suspects.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Slaying Sweethearts
programme.desc: When Erika DeNardo‚Äôs mother and brother were murdered, she told police and neighbours it had been the work of thieves.

programme.title: Crime Stories: Girls Just Wanna Get Found
programme.desc: Cindy Zarzycki is 13 years old when she goes missing on her way to a Detroit ice cream store.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Long Stemmed Killer
programme.desc: Just hours before her divorce hearing, Atlanta socialite Lita McClinton opens her front door for a flower delivery. The deliveryman hands her a box of roses and then shoots her dead.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Russians Are Killing
programme.desc: It is just another meeting for Los Angeles real estate developer Meyer Muscatel. Unfortunately Muscatel meets with a Russian immigrant with murderous intent.

programme.title: Crime Stories: A Way with Murder
programme.desc: Nancy, David and Susan Spangler are found shot to death in their home - the brutal slaughter is deemed a murder suicide.

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 079
programme.desc: When 25-year-old Kevin Bacon missed Christmas breakfast, his parents grew concerned. Phone records led police to Mark Latunski, previously reported for holding men captive. Kevin was found dead in a hidden sex chamber in Latunski’s home.
programme.sub-title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 079

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 086
programme.desc: When Nevada politician Kathy Augustine was found comatose at home, the public was stunned. She died three days later, raising the question: was it stress from a brutal campaign or murder?
programme.sub-title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 086

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 093
programme.desc: Bianca Devins, 17, was killed by obsessed friend Brandon Clark after her graduation. The two met on Instagram and stayed friends, but Clark’s fixation turned deadly. He posted images of her murder online and was later sentenced to 25 years to life.
programme.sub-title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 093

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 100
programme.desc: College student Shannon Melendi was kidnapped and murdered after working as a softball scorekeeper. A single cloth fragment led investigators to the killer—umpire Colvin "Butch" Hinton.
programme.sub-title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 100

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 110
programme.desc: Keith Wolf was enjoying a quiet night with his wife and daughter when a noise from the basement drew his attention. Armed, he went to investigate—unaware it would lead to a tragic and deadly turn.
programme.sub-title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 110

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 117
programme.desc: Frank Botts was stabbed to death in his store. Police questioned whether it was a robbery gone wrong or a killer he knew.
programme.sub-title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 117

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 006
programme.desc: Cyclist Moriah Wilson was fatally shot after meeting ex-lover Colin Strickland. Surveillance led police to Colin’s home, uncovering a deadly plot by his jealous girlfriend, Kaitlin Armstrong.
programme.sub-title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 006

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 013
programme.desc: Murder of Barbara Sheppard – A mother of two is found murdered. Her boyfriend is a suspect, but police uncover a vengeful ex-husband angry over losing custody.
programme.sub-title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 013

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 025
programme.desc: Murder of Erin Corwin – Pregnant Marine wife Erin was killed by her lover Chris Lee during a hike in Joshua Tree. Upset she planned to end their affair, he murdered her and dumped her in an abandoned mine shaft. Lee received life without parole.
programme.sub-title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 025

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 031
programme.desc: Murder of Joy Blanchard – After her Day of the Dead party, Joy was found murdered. Guests thought it was part of the event, but DNA led investigators 10 years later to her nephew Charles Simmer, who killed her after she asked him to move out.
programme.sub-title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 031

programme.title: Judgment With Ashleigh Banfield: Judgment of Dr. Conrad Murray
programme.desc: Michael Jackson's personal doctor Conrad Murray took an oath to first do no harm. But that's exactly what prosecutors say Murray did when Jackson died from an overdose of a powerful anesthesia drug.

programme.title: Judgment With Ashleigh Banfield: Judgment of The Hollywood Stalker
programme.desc: Where is Baby Gabriel? At one point, his mother Elizabeth Johnson claimed she killed him. At another, she said that she gave him to a mysterious couple in Texas.

programme.title: Judgment With Ashleigh Banfield: Judgment of Rabbi Neulander
programme.desc: Rabbi Fred Neulander was a pillar of his Cherry Hill, New Jersey community – the founder of a synagogue, a father and a husband.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: When Mona's parents accidentally sell her Book of the Slimy at their garage sale Mona has to get it back // Can a lovelorn vampire lady and a lonely-hearted werewolf find true love?

programme.desc: Fang develops a flea problem, which soon infests the whole house. // Ever since Principal Shawbly started jogging, he's felt a lot lighter.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: An evening's dining at a local Chinese restaurant takes a terrifying turn // Angela has started a chapter of the Pixies, an all girl service organization devoted to being helpful

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Beauty Burglars
programme.desc: Detectives Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) are assigned to a special task force to investigate a series of beauty salon robberies. The case becomes more complicated when it is discovered that the burglars are posing as police officers.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: High Steel
programme.desc: Harvey (John Karlen) disagrees with the outcome of an investigation after a former colleague falls to his death at a construction site. Harvey recruits Mary Beth (Tyne Daly) to help him investigate what he believes to be a murder.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Hotline
programme.desc: After three women are found strangled, Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) investigate whether or not there is a connection between the attacks and an erotic hotline. Also starring Al Waxman and Carl Lumbly.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Internal Affairs
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) are assigned by Internal Affairs to check out a security leak among the 14th Precinct's personnel, forcing the duo to reluctantly spy on their colleagues. Also starring Al Waxman and Carl Lumbly.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Mr. Lonelyhearts
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) are called in when an elderly man comes looking for his wife. But a simple missing persons case soon turns into a major bigamy and fraud case. All the while Cagney deals with a suitor.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Conduct Unbecoming
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) team together with another detective, Charles Stephens (guest star Christopher Allport), to investigate an illegal handgun operation. However, their investigation is impeded by Charles's suspension.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: I'll Be Home For Christmas
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) are looking forward to an early release on Christmas Eve when a man dressed as Santa Claus (guest star Richard Masur), who has been arrested for charity fraud, escapes from his cell in the 14th precinct.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Recreational Use
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey team up with Sergeant Dory McKenna (guest star Barry Primus) in an investigation of a group of senior citizens terrorized by their landlord. Cagney's romance with Dory is complicated by his addiction to cocaine.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Hopes And Dreams
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) investigate a series of burglaries that occurred while all of the victims were at funerals. They become especially interested in a young teenage victim, who is bound to a wheelchair.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Grandest Jewel Thief Of Them All
programme.desc: Lacey (Tyne Daly) becomes worried when Cagney (Sharon Gless) becomes obsessed with catching notorious jewel thief Albert Grand (guest star Ferdy Mayne), who despite committing several hotel safe robberies has never been convicted.
programme.sub-title: Grandest Jewel Thief Of Them All

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Affirmative Action
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) find that they have very mixed emotions when another female detective (guest star Talia Balsam) is assigned to the 14th precinct. Also staring Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels and Carl Lumbly as Mark Petrie.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Open And Shut Case
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey's (Tyne Daly) faith in the legal system is tested when a solid homicide case crumbles and a friend and former rape victim is forced to relive her courtroom ordeal. Also staring Al Waxman and Carl Lumbly.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Jane Doe #37
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) refuses to drop the investigation into a murdered Jane Doe, who also happens to be a homeless woman. Cagney is determined to discover her real identity before her burial. Also starring Tyne Daly, Al Waxman, and Carl Lumbly.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Date Rape
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey are at odds over the investigation of a rape case. Cagney sides with the male investigators who feel the woman is at fault, while Lacey sides with the woman. Things become more complicated when the woman's past is used against her.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Burn-Out
programme.desc: When Lacey's vacation is temporarily postponed, she becomes overwhelmed with her responsibilities as a cop, wife, and mother. Meanwhile, Cagney goes undercover as a nun to investigate drugs that have gone missing from a hospital.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Chop Shop
programme.desc: Detective Victor Isbecki's cover is blown during an investigation of a dangerous car theft ring and he becomes a hostage. Cagney and Lacey must work to help save him while coming to terms with their own failures in the investigation.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Let Them Eat Pretzels
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey find what should be a simple hit-and-run accident becomes deeply complicated when the son of a diplomat becomes involved. The team must figure out how to arrest the son, while the father attempts to stop them.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: The Gang's All There
programme.desc: While out at a bar celebrating Petrie's promotion, the 14th precinct is robbed of their guns, shields, and possessions. The team then works furiously to find the perpetrators after they become the laughing stock of the entire NYPD.
